t: Discoms post first collective profit in over a decade — ₹2,701 cr PAT in FY25
India hits 50% non-fossil installed capacity, meeting its 2030 NDC target four years early
Record 52.5 GW capacity added in FY26 — highest ever in a single year, ~76% renewables
National grid crosses 5 lakh ckm of transmission lines and 1,407 GVA transformation capacity
All-time peak demand of 270.8 GW met in May 2026 amid widespread heatwave
Electricity (Amendment) Bill 2026 mandates cost-reflective tariffs; discom credit profiles in focus
Market coupling of Day-Ahead Market goes live, creating single clearing price across exchanges
Punjab yet to begin RDSS smart-meter rollout; AT&C slips to 19.2% on collection dips
Generator dues down 96% — from ₹1.40 L cr (2022) to ₹4,927 cr under Late Payment Surcharge Rules
